refund.buyer: I need the money to purchase the correct jersey for my nephew.
refund.seller: The listing didn't state is was for a specific jersey and I fulfilled my end of the deal.

buyer_review.buyer: To inform other to be cautious when purchasing from the seller.
buyer_review.seller: It helps other sellers from ending up in a similar situation.

seller_review.buyer: So other sellers won't view me as a troublemaker and refuse to sell to me.

seller_apology.buyer: To be seen in a positive light by other sellers.
seller_apology.seller: It makes the buyer accept responsibility.

buyer_apology.buyer: To be seen in a positive light by other sellers.
buyer_apology.seller: It makes the buyer accept responsibility.

speaker: Buyer
text: Hello

speaker: Seller
text: Hi

speaker: Buyer
text: I would like to discuss a refund for the jersey I purchased and ask that your negative review of me be removed.

speaker: Seller
text: I am sorry for the frustrating situation.

speaker: Seller
text: However, I do not want to issue a refund.

speaker: Seller
text: The listing clearly stated that it was not for any specific jersey and that all sales are final.

speaker: Seller
text: As for the negative review, I would be willing to remove it if you remove the bad review of me

speaker: Buyer
text: The original listing stated it was a Kobe Bryant jersey.

speaker: Buyer
text: I paid particular attention because the purchase is for my nephew who is ill and a huge Kobe Bryant fan.

speaker: Buyer
text: If possible can you provide me with the correct jersey?

speaker: Seller
text: I'm sorry that you misunderstood the listing.

speaker: Seller
text: Nowhere did it state it was for that specific jersey.

speaker: Seller
text: I don't currently have a Kobe Bryant jersey that I can send you.

speaker: Buyer
text: Would you be willing to provide some sort of financial reimbursement?

speaker: Buyer
text: My nephew really wants the jersey and because he is terminally ill I really want to obtain it for him.

speaker: Buyer
text: I would be willing to remove my review if I am reimbursed in some way.

speaker: Buyer
text: I really wish I saved the original listing because I'm positive it advertised for the Kobe Bryant jersey, I looked for it specifically because it is important.

speaker: Seller
text: No, I'm sorry, but I can't reimburse you.

speaker: Seller
text: As a seller, I fulfilled my end of the deal.

speaker: Seller
text: As a buyer it is your responsibility to fully read listings.

speaker: Seller
text: This seems to be a reoccurring issue for you as I see other sellers have left similar reviews of you.

speaker: Seller
text: I am sorry about your nephew.

speaker: Seller
text: I recommend you try to sell the jersey yourself if you do not want to keep it.

speaker: Buyer
text: I'm sure your original listing was for a Kobe Bryant jersey.

speaker: Buyer
text: I think it is important others use caution when making purchasing that cannot be returned or refunded if they are not what the customer expects so I won't remove my review.

speaker: Seller
text: Again, I'm sorry that you didn't fully read my listing.

speaker: Seller
text: You are the only buyer that has overlooked the details of it.

speaker: Seller
text: I'm about to walk away as you are wasting my time and yours.

speaker: Seller
text: You should really learn how to take responsibility for your own mistakes.

speaker: Seller
text: I also don't appreciate you trying to manipulate me with telling me the jersey is for a terminally ill child.

speaker: Seller
text: You should be ashamed of yourself.

speaker: Buyer
text: Unfortunately my nephew is in deed terminally ill, $75 is not enough for me to make up a horrible lie.

speaker: Buyer
text: The jersey is important to him which is why I am determined to obtain it.

speaker: Buyer
text: As a seller the customer's satisfaction should be your number one priority.

speaker: Buyer
text: I actually feel manipulated because your company changed the listing, the review is deserved.

speaker: Seller
text: Submitted agreement: Buyer gets no refund, seller kept their review, buyer kept their review, seller did apologize, and buyer didn't apologize.

speaker: Buyer
text: Reject Deal

speaker: Buyer
text: Why is your company not willing to take accountability for their error?

speaker: Buyer
text: Misleading consumers is okay with you?

speaker: Seller
text: I Walk Away.
